title: trifolium repens var. orphanideum
intro: Trifolium repens var. orphanideum, also known as the white clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of white clover include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and support immune function, while also providing a natural source of vitamins and minerals. White clover can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
